description_long: This arcade game cabinet is a classic upright machine featuring vibrant and detailed artwork themed around the Mortal Kombat franchise. The front panel displays a large screen above a control panel with two sets of joysticks and multiple colored buttons, designed for two-player gameplay. The control panel is decorated with game-specific graphics and labeled controls, while the lower section houses a coin slot and access door. The side panels are adorned with striking illustrations of a martial artist and a golden dragon, set against a deep red background with distressed effects. The top marquee is illuminated and prominently displays the Mortal Kombat logo in bold, stylized lettering. The cabinet is constructed from wood and metal, with a glass or plastic screen cover and a visible power cord extending from the back.
description: A Mortal Kombat-themed upright arcade game cabinet with vivid side artwork, a dual-player control panel, and a prominent illuminated marquee. The cabinet features a coin slot, detailed graphics, and a sturdy build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, dual-player control panel with joysticks and buttons, coin slot, and the illuminated Mortal Kombat marquee.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large martial artist and dragon artwork, as well as the cabinet's depth and power cord.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back panel with ventilation grilles and the power cord extending from the bottom.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same martial artist and dragon artwork and a clear view of the control panel's side profile.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, slightly curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen area.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two sets of joysticks and six buttons per player arranged side-by-side, with additional start buttons and colorful game-themed markings.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the Mortal Kombat logo in bold, stylized text with a fiery color scheme and dramatic background, illuminated from behind.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature large, detailed artwork of a martial artist in combat pose with a golden dragon, set against a distressed red background.
